message:
chore: update beads issue tracker and audit index (batches 492-494)

Beads issues:
  - Close asupersync-1qfd0.489 (oracle ZeroEffort misclassification)
  - Close asupersync-v2t30y (rch test blocker)
  - Update several in-progress issues with agent comments

Audit index (batches 492-494):
  - Batch 492: scheduler three_lane, cx.rs, semaphore, notify, mutex
    — all SOUND (lock ordering, cancel-safety, FIFO fairness)
  - Batch 493: oracle task_leak — FIXED (post-close spawn blind spot)
  - Batch 494: oracle finalizer — FIXED (late registration blind spot)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
